company.name: VantArc Agency
company.tagline: Marketing & product development that turns artists into brands

services.name: Brand Strategy & Identity
services.description: Complete brand positioning, visual identity, and brand guidelines tailored for artists and creative professionals
services.idealFor: Artists and creatives launching or repositioning their brand

services.name: Pitch Decks & Investor Materials
services.description: Compelling pitch decks, one-pagers, and investor-ready presentations for creative projects and ventures
services.idealFor: Artists seeking funding, grants, or partnership opportunities

services.name: Marketing & Product Development Retainer
services.description: Ongoing marketing strategy, campaign management, social media, and product development support
services.idealFor: Artists and creative businesses ready for sustained growth

differentiators: Deep understanding of the creative and artist ecosystem
Full-service: strategy, design, marketing, and product development under one roof
Based in Linz, Austria — connected to the European creative scene
Track record with hospitality, music, and cultural projects
company.targetMarket: Artists, musicians, creative professionals, and cultural projects in Austria and Europe

widget.greeting: Hey! Looking for marketing support or help developing your creative project? I can help you figure out what VantArc can do for you.

projectType.question: Do they have a clear creative project or brand need?

budget.question: Is their budget realistic (min EUR 1,250/month retainer or EUR 1,500+ for projects)?

timeline.question: Do they have a timeline within the next 3 months?

decisionMaker.question: Are they the artist/founder or directly involved in the decision?
